comments:
Chic & Basic Born wins by a huge margin, and there may be other real Barcelona hotels in that JSON with Genius discounts that also beat $797.

This is an eval bug. The task instruction says "find the cheapest Genius-discounted property … at most $800", but the grader's canonical_diff (booking_find_genius_deal.yaml:182) requires property_id == target['property_id'] — i.e., it only accepts Barcelona Genius Boutique. A correct "find the cheapest" answer (Chic & Basic Born) would be graded as failing. The YAML doesn't set skip_real_hotels, so the real-hotels distractor pool is loaded into the same Barcelona search.
